name: cloudiqus-intelligence
description: Market intel — company research, sector analysis, competitor map, buying signals, account intelligence.

skills.name: account-intelligence
skills.description: Deep account intelligence for existing CloudiQS customers — expansion opportunities, risk signals, stakeholder mapping, and multi-year value potential.

skills.name: aws-partner-landscape
skills.description: AWS partner ecosystem intelligence — tiers, programmes, PDM relationships, co-sell mechanics, and how CloudiQS positions within the ecosystem.

skills.name: buying-signals
skills.description: Real-time buying signal detection for CloudiQS — what signals to look for, where to find them, and how to act on them within 24 hours.

skills.name: company-research
skills.description: Deep company research framework for CloudiQS — beyond basics. Identifies tech stack, buying signals, org structure, and the single best conversation opener.

skills.name: competitor-map
skills.description: CloudiQS competitive landscape — direct AWS partner competitors, how to differentiate, and what to do when they're mentioned in a sales conversation.

skills.name: sector-analysis
skills.description: Sector-specific AWS consulting intelligence for CloudiQS target sectors — education, financial services, manufacturing, retail, healthcare. Tailors messaging and proof points by sector.

commands.name: competitor-intel
commands.description: Competitive intelligence for a specific sales situation — who is CloudiQS competing against and how to win.

commands.name: research
commands.description: Deep research on a company or sector for CloudiQS outreach or account planning.

commands.name: sector-brief
commands.description: Sector intelligence brief for a target industry — AWS patterns, pain points, CloudiQS angle, proof points.

commands.name: signals
commands.description: Identify and prioritise buying signals for a set of target companies. Returns ranked action list.
